'''Imbats''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], known for their size and relative lack of intelligence.

==Biology and appearance==
Imbats were a very large and bulky [[Species/Legends|species]], towering over 2.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. Their legs were thick and muscled, with toes capable of grasping. They possessed disproportionately small heads with long, drooping ears. Their skin was leathery and tough.

Imbats were known to be very strong and physically tough. They were greatly lacking in intelligence, and were considered to be only "marginally" [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]].

==Society and culture==
Imbats were considered to be a very unintelligent species by others in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and were exploited due to this shortcoming. They ended up being trapped into indentured servitude by more advanced species.

==History==
Imbats were used as [[Security guard/Legends|guards]] by the [[Offworld Mining Corporation]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Offworld Corp. purchased a shipment of the beings from a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] named [[Norta]], and used them to guard the [[Ionite]] [[Mining/Legends|mines]] on [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]]. In [[43 BBY/Legends|43 BBY]], [[Unidentified Imbat bartender|One individual]] also worked on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] as a bartender at the [[Splendor Tavern]]. Another of his kind was seen taking his place [[29 BBY/Legends|fourteen years later]].
